entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cajanus cajan (L) Millsp. used in the study

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a larger germplasm collection used to study genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species

entities.name: ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: A statistical method used to check for significant variation among characters

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The number of days taken for 50% of the plants to flower

entities.name: DAYS TO MATURITY
entities.description: The number of days from sowing to physiological maturity

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical distance from the ground to the highest point of the plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF BRANCHES PER PLANT
entities.description: The count of branches produced by a single plant

entities.name: POD BEARING LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the part of the plant that bears pods

entities.name: NUMBER OF PODS PER PLANT
entities.description: The total count of pods produced per plant

entities.name: NUMBER OF SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: The average number of seeds found within a single pod

entities.name: SEED YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The total weight of seeds produced by a single plant

entities.name: HUNDRED SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of one hundred seeds of the crop

entities.name: MOLECULAR DIVERSITY
entities.description: Genetic variation at the molecular level

entities.name: SIMPLE SEQUENCE REPEAT
entities.description: A type of DNA marker used to identify genetic variation

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted Pair Group Method with Arithmetic Mean used for clustering

entities.name: DENDROGRAM
entities.description: A diagram representing the hierarchical clustering of genotypes

entities.name: CCM 602
entities.description: A specific SSR marker used for genotype identification

entities.name: FINGER PRINTING
entities.description: The process of identifying genotypes using molecular markers

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region used to categorize genotypes

entities.name: GEOGRAPHICAL ORIGIN
entities.description: The location from which the genotypes were sourced
